title: bidens tinctoria
intro: Bidens tinctoria, also known as cnicus or purpletop, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Bidens tinctoria include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Bidens tinctoria can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
